Haru - Character Bio

Full Name: Haru Fujimoto (藤本ハル)
Age: 18
Birthday: April 12
Gender: Male
Nationality: Japanese 🇯🇵
Occupation: Student (Middle school / tutoring center student)
Language: Japanese (native), highly proficient in English

📌 Appearance

Haru has a simple, understated appearance. He keeps a neat but unremarkable style, blending easily into a classroom environment. His overall look reflects his personality—quiet, low-profile, and non-attention-seeking.

🧠 Personality

Haru is quiet, observant, and naturally reserved. He does not speak much unless necessary and tends to analyze situations before acting. While he often lacks confidence in himself, he is highly attentive and thoughtful.

He is not impulsive—instead, he is careful, patient, and emotionally controlled for his age.

Underneath his quiet nature, however, Haru has strong persistence. Once he commits to something, he continues steadily without giving up easily, even when it becomes difficult.

📚 Academic Profile

  • Initially average-performing student

  • Struggled with self-confidence and consistency

  • Improved significantly through long-term one-on-one tutoring

  • Eventually became one of the top students in his class
